summary: Designs, analyzes, and improves processes using structured CQI methods and data-driven experimentation.
responsibilities: Map current-state and future-state processes using standardized modeling methods
Lead structured CQI projects using PDCA/PDSA, DMAIC, or equivalent methodologies
Conduct root-cause analysis using tools such as 5 Whys, Ishikawa diagrams, and fault-tree analysis
Perform statistical analysis to evaluate process capability, variation, and improvement impact
Design and validate countermeasures through controlled experiments and pilots
Collaborate with operators and supervisors to ensure solutions are practical and sustainable
Document process changes, update standard work, and ensure proper version control
Maintain the improvement pipeline and ensure project rigor and traceability
Support digital instrumentation of processes for real-time monitoring and feedback
authorities: Define process parameters and capability baselines
Approve changes to standard work after validation
Request audits or deeper investigations into systemic issues
decisionRights: Escalation of systemic risks to Quality Manager

constraints: Changes must be validated before full deployment
Must comply with quality and safety standards
Must document all parameter changes and experiments
